overall.description: First-person exploration of an abandoned farm called Redwood Farm in a video game setting (Cyberpunk 2077). The player walks past a large corrugated metal hangar along a dirt path, approaches a farmhouse with a satellite dish, passes a flock of flamingos near the porch, and continues toward distant industrial structures with a city skyline visible against the mountains.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a large metal hangar on the left side of a dirt path. The camera walks steadily forward past yellow construction barriers, with mountains visible in the distance and smoke rising on the left horizon. The location is identified as 'Redwood Farm' via on-screen text.

scene_state.functional_zone: open farm road approaching main farmhouse

agents.ego_description: walking down dirt road toward farmhouse with satellite dish on roof

large satellite dish mounted on farmhouse roof

small building with tall communication antenna
futuristic city skyscrapers visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the industrial hangar, the scene opens into a rural farm setting. A wooden farmhouse with a prominent satellite dish comes into view ahead, while a large tree stands on the right. In the far distance, a futuristic city skyline contrasts with the abandoned farm environment.

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the farmhouse closely, revealing a wooden porch with stairs. A flock of pink flamingos stands on the ground near the porch, creating a surreal contrast with the abandoned setting. The farmhouse now dominates the left side of the frame as the camera passes by.

scene_state.functional_zone: open farm road leading to communication building

agents.ego_description: continuing past farmhouse toward small building with communication antenna

entered.detail: metal chain link fence running alongside the road

segments.scene_description: Leaving the farmhouse behind, the camera continues along the dirt road toward a small building with a tall antenna. A chain link fence and metal silo appear on the right side, while the distant mountains and city skyline remain visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an industrial perimeter into the surreal, abandoned heart of a rural farm. It begins by walking steadily past a large metal hangar and yellow construction barriers along a dirt path, with smoke rising on the horizon against a backdrop of distant mountains. As the camera moves away from the industrial structures, the scene opens into a farm setting where a wooden farmhouse with a satellite dish emerges, contrasted by a futuristic city skyline in the far distance. The camera then approaches the farmhouse closely, passing a flock of pink flamingos gathered by the wooden porch before the building shifts to the left of the frame. Finally, the path leads away from the house toward a small building with a tall antenna, passing a chain link fence and a metal silo while the mountains and city skyline remain visible ahead.
